# Russia.md
> Last updated: 2026-03-19

## What is this?
Russia.md is an open-source, AI-friendly knowledge base about Russia. It is a Russia-focused fork of the original `taiwan-md` country-knowledge project, keeping the upstream markdown-first site structure while replacing the active corpus with Russia-specific material.

## Current shape
- 12 top-level categories
- 1 starter article per category
- 1 agent-integration brief in `SKILLS.md`

## What makes it useful for LLMs
- Markdown-first source material
- Stable category structure
- Searchable article pages
- Explicit resource links for official portals and developer entry points

## Caveat
This fork is still in an early rebuild stage. It is useful as a structural base and a seed corpus, not yet as a complete reference work.
